name: Demo Plugin
description: Demonstrates all plugin features — settings UI types, config layout, UI extensions, label colors, and field validation. For local development and testing only.
author: Hot Sheet
icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>

preferences.label: API Key
preferences.description: A secret API key (demonstrates global-scoped secret fields)

preferences.label: Auto-greet on sync
preferences.description: Show a greeting when sync runs (demonstrates boolean toggle)

preferences.label: Max Items
preferences.description: Maximum number of items to process (demonstrates number input)

preferences.label: Region
preferences.description: Server region — pick from list or type a custom value (demonstrates combo box)

preferences.label: Sync Mode
preferences.description: When to sync (demonstrates dropdown, alias for select)

preferences.label: Webhook URL
preferences.description: Optional callback URL (demonstrates non-required string with URL validation)
